While attending the bonfire party at the Torch Festival of the Yi ethnic group this week, Lucy took the opportunity to quiz the people on their favorite sport to watch in this year's Paris Olympics. What is their top choice? Watch this to find out.

title: Lucy's Journey: Which Olympic sport is the people's favorite? - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: While attending the bonfire party at the Torch Festival of the Yi ethnic group this week, Lucy took the opportunity to quiz the people on their favorite sport to watch in this year's Paris Olympics. What is their top choice?
